CREATE TABLE test_least (a INT, b INT);
SELECT least(ROUND(3.7), ROUND(3.3)), least(NULL, 10), least(10, NULL);
SELECT least(a, b) as minimum FROM test_least WHERE a IS NOT NULL AND b IS NOT NULL;
SELECT (SELECT least(a, b) FROM test_least WHERE a > 0) as min_positive;
SELECT least(a, (SELECT AVG(b) FROM test_least)) as min_avg_b FROM test_least;
CREATE TABLE test_least_2 (c INT, d INT);
SELECT least(a, b) FROM test_least JOIN test_least_2 ON test_least.a = test_least_2.c;
SELECT least(least(a, b), (SELECT MAX(d) FROM test_least_2)) FROM test_least;
SELECT least(least(a, b), least(c, d)) as final_min FROM test_least, test_least_2;
CREATE TABLE nested_test (e INT) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY e;
SELECT least(e, (SELECT MIN(b) FROM test_least)) FROM nested_test WHERE e IS NOT NULL;
SELECT least((SELECT MIN(a) FROM test_least), (SELECT MAX(c) FROM test_least_2));
